# 2026 Marketing Statistics, Trends, & Data
[___](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#)

We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our [Cookie Policy](https://legal.hubspot.com/cookie-policy?_ga=2.50914222.648097249.1661181827-2085802971.1659562077).

Products Products 

    *   ## The HubSpot Customer Platform

All of HubSpot's marketing, sales, and customer service software on one AI-powered platform. [Free HubSpot CRM](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-freecrm)[Overview of all products](https://www.hubspot.com/products/get-started?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-platform)  
    *   ## The HubSpot Customer Platform

All of HubSpot's marketing, sales, and customer service software on one agentic platform. [Free HubSpot CRM](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-freecrm)[Overview of all products](https://www.hubspot.com/products/get-started?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-platform)  

    *    ### Marketing Hub

Marketing automation software

[Free and premium plans](https://www.hubspot.com/products/marketing?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-marketing)  
    *    ### Sales Hub

Sales software

[Free and premium plans](https://www.hubspot.com/products/sales?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-sales)  
    *    ### Service Hub

Customer service software

[Free and premium plans](https://www.hubspot.com/products/service?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-service)  
    *    ### Content Hub

Content marketing software

[Free and premium plans](https://www.hubspot.com/products/content?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-content)  
    *    ### Data Hub

Data management software

[Free and premium plans](https://www.hubspot.com/products/data?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-data)  
    *    ### Commerce Hub

CPQ, billing, and payments software

[Free and premium plans](https://www.hubspot.com/products/commerce?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-commerce)  
    *    ### Smart CRM

AI-powered, flexible CRM software

[Learn more](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm/ai-crm?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-smartcrm)  
    *    ### Small Business Bundle

The Starter edition of each product, built for startups and small businesses

[Learn more](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm/starter?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-starter)  

    *    ### Breeze

HubSpot's AI that powers the entire customer platform

[See all AI features](https://www.hubspot.com/products/artificial-intelligence?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-ai)  
    *    ### Breeze

AI agents and features that power the entire platform

[Learn more](https://www.hubspot.com/products/artificial-intelligence?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-ai)  
    *    ### Breeze Agents

AI-powered specialists that extend your team's marketing, sales, and service capabilities

[Meet your AI growth team](https://www.hubspot.com/products/artificial-intelligence/breeze-ai-agents?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-breezeagents)  
    *    ### AEO (Beta)

Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results

[Learn more](https://www.hubspot.com/products/aeo?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-aeo)  
    *    ### HubSpot Marketplace

Connect your favorite apps to HubSpot

[See all integrations](https://ecosystem.hubspot.com/marketplace/apps?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-marketplace)

    *    
## Marketing 

        *   ### [Generate leads](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/generate-leads?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-leads)

Convert visitors into contacts for your database.  
        *   ### [Automate marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/automate-marketing?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-automate)

Create campaigns with automation and AI.  

    *    
## Sales 

        *   ### [Build pipeline](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/build-sales-pipeline?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-pipeline)

Generate a pipeline of high-quality prospects.  
        *   ### [Close deals](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/close-more-deals?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-deals)

Streamline your process and close more deals faster.  

    *    
## Customer Service 

        *   ### [Scale support](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/scale-customer-service-support?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-support)

Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.  
        *   ### [Drive retention](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/drive-customer-satisfaction?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-retention)

Identify opportunities to improve customer health.  

    *    
## Content 

        *   ### [Create content](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/create-content-for-customer-journey?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-create)

Easily craft content for your audience, with help from AI.  
        *   ### [Manage content](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/manage-content?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-manage)

Organize, update, and distribute content in one place.  

    *    
## Startups & Small Businesses 

        *   ### [Find and reach customers](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/find-and-reach-customers?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-find)

Generate leads through content, AI, and automation.  
        *   ### [Grow sales and get paid](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/grow-sales-and-get-paid-faster?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-grow)

Prospect smarter and automate payments.  
        *   ### [Organize customer data](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/understand-and-organize-customer-data?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-data)

Unify your team and data on one platform.  

    *    
## Artificial Intelligence 

        *   ### [Resolve customer queries 24/7](https://www.hubspot.com/products/artificial-intelligence/ai-customer-service-agent?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-customeragent)

Scale customer service with an AI customer agent.  
        *   ### [Automate sales prospecting](https://www.hubspot.com/products/sales/ai-prospecting-agent?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-prospectagent)

Identify and engage high-value leads with an AI prospecting agent.  
        *   ### [Research customers faster](https://www.hubspot.com/products/artificial-intelligence/ai-data-agent?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-dataagent)

Get instant answers about your customers with an AI data agent.  

## By Team Size

    *   ![Image 3: Small Businesses & Start ups](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics) ### For Small Businesses & Startups

HubSpot’s all-in-one Starter Customer Platform helps your growing startup or small business find and win customers from day one.

[Learn more about HubSpot’s Starter Customer Platform](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm/starter?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-smallbiz)  
    *   ![Image 4: Enterprise](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics) ### For Enterprises

With HubSpot’s integrated Enterprise Customer Platform, you don’t have to sacrifice power for ease of use.

[Learn more about HubSpot’s Enterprise Customer Platform](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm/enterprise?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-enterprise)  

## Why HubSpot?

    *   ![Image 5: Why Choose HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics) ### Why Choose HubSpot?

After just one year, HubSpot customers acquire 129% more leads, close 36% more deals, and see a 37% improvement in ticket closure rates.

[Learn more about why how HubSpot’s solution is different](https://www.hubspot.com/why-choose-hubspot?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-wch)  
    *   ![Image 6: Case Studies](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics) ### Case Studies

Explore examples of companies like yours from all over the globe that use HubSpot to unite their teams, empower their businesses, and grow better.

[See all case studies](https://www.hubspot.com/case-studies?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-casestudies)  
    *   ![Image 7](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics) ### Spotlight: Product Updates

Learn about HubSpot’s featured product releases and announcements in this semi-annual product showcase.

[Explore product updates](https://www.hubspot.com/spotlight?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-spotlight)

*    Products Products
    *   ## The HubSpot Customer Platform

All of HubSpot's marketing, sales, and customer service software on one AI-powered platform. 
    *   ## The HubSpot Customer Platform

All of HubSpot's marketing, sales, and customer service software on one agentic platform. 
    *   [### Free HubSpot CRM](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-software-freecrm)

*    Solutions Solutions
    *    By Use Case 

        *   ## Marketing

            *   [Generate leads](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/generate-leads?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-leads)
            *   [Automate marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/automate-marketing?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-automate)

        *   ## Sales

            *   [Build pipeline](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/build-sales-pipeline?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-pipeline)
            *   [Close deals](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/close-more-deals?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-deals)

        *   ## Customer Service

            *   [Scale support](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/scale-customer-service-support?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-support)
            *   [Drive retention](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/drive-customer-satisfaction?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-retention)

        *   ## Content

            *   [Create content](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/create-content-for-customer-journey?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-create)
            *   [Manage content](https://www.hubspot.com/use-case/manage-content?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=nav-solutions-manage)

        *   ## Why HubSpot?

 
            *   ![Image 23: Why Choose HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/assets/hubspot.com/global-navigation/2025/Why%20Choose%20HubSpot.webp?width=1035&height=450&name=Why%20Choose%20HubSpot.webp) ### Why Choose HubSpot?

After just one year, HubSpot customers acquire 129% more leads, close 36% more deals, and see a 37% improvement in ticket closure rates.

# Marketing Statistics Every Team Needs to Grow in 2026

To be an effective marketer, you must keep up with the latest marketing statistics so you can better reach your target audience and boost conversions.

[Download HubSpot's State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing?hubs_post-cta=pageheader)

![Image 26: team discusses marketing stats](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/GettyImages-950986656.jpg?width=966&height=644&name=GettyImages-950986656.jpg)

Menu

Scroll Left Scroll Right

*   [Content Marketing Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#content-marketing-statistics) 
*   [Social Media Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#social-media-statistics) 
*   [Video Marketing Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#video-marketing-statistics) 
*   [Email Marketing Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#email-marketing-statistics) 
*   [Lead Generation Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#lead-generation-statistics) 
*   [Advertising Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#advertising-statistics) 
*   [Marketing Technology Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#marketing-technology-statistics) 
*   [Sales Statistics](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#sales-statistics) 

[facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics)

[linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A//www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&title=Marketing%20Statistics&summary=Want%20to%20know%20the%20latest%20trends%20in%20marketing%20and%20sales?%20Check%20out%20this%20ultimate%20guide%20to%20marketing%20statistics.&source=)

[twitter](https://twitter.com/home?status=Want%20to%20know%20the%20latest%20trends%20in%20marketing%20and%20sales?%20Check%20out%20this%20ultimate%20guide%20to%20marketing%20statistics%20-%20https%3A//www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics)

Nothing in marketing sits still. The latest trends, technologies, and tactics are always changing with consumers, culture, and even society. Keeping an eye on the newest marketing statistics is critical to stay competitive and relevant.

Whether you’re focused on content marketing, advertising, or marketing tech, I’ve collected the stats you need to connect with your customers. I’ll also dive into [search engine optimization](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/seo?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=search-engine-optimization), or SEO, so you can see how consumers find information about your brand online. With this info, you can increase your website’s visibility on search engine results pages (SERPs).

The following marketing statistics will help you fine-tune your SEO strategy, increase website traffic, and boost conversions.

[### Download Now: HubSpot's Annual State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=af5b3705-d3dd-4659-bdd1-de774dbcf009&signature=AAH58kEFlCqt7-LTbdedmwOW6RhSHA_pSg&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=3d0bc27a-898d-40d5-aa46-8696ed81c4ee&click=26a1d382-90f1-4015-b11f-193edc559048&redirect_url=APefjpHEEdBG2Po-0fhfjiE9M2fuEjq8pxZdutqTelEO7F44EV_-voVvW95XSGn0fpHRdMDBcETSVui8waGuXv3_Y2T6aWBzluHB7UY8TZzdjtjaECG1BUoBZ1HXBy6W1LymIudYai-o11IVvbT7pL9lZ4SBCW_T9JTpSe1PIOKRIOyaTCMMH863tRqF6C4j0Vi0u8Y9vmiHwW5gig7qXHAPCn8fveAvQQ&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018450&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Download Now: HubSpot's Annual State of Marketing Report")

## Search Engine Optimization Statistics

[](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics)
[Search engine optimization](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/seo?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=search-engine-optimization), or SEO, allows you to understand and optimize how consumers find information about your brand and your competitors online. By incorporating SEO strategies in your marketing efforts, you’ll increase your website’s visibility and rankings on search engine results pages (SERPs).

The following SEO marketing statistics will help you fine-tune your SEO strategy, increase website traffic, and boost conversions.

[### Download Now: Free State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=34a15897-4b09-4651-8375-c23ec2a46845&signature=AAH58kHjFAiIRRqMzBUpMPoed6m1R5erqQ&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=6baeae42-e710-4ecd-beb9-ceb2fb9f0877&click=eb6829ed-894d-493f-b32e-3206755884cd&redirect_url=APefjpFOrASGA5nhG9HPsXZuP0XqT-jCWysB6lty0DY-FGgNxp9Lob-J-BXPNFtRxKRn2nqllmJxF3tMUAlZp5QZC5n-fNl9F5w3XIqOVLFsmXWNsR-TvfFleWRYobYI_feA1eKIHbNqSGhtXRBX5ecFWUocrrckgK_-B97rSP1FCyD73YzgaCDbKhLiTEa6h2Rxks2JjN68467zJeV_mzkh0C2tT2IxjA&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018459&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Download Now: Free State of Marketing Report")

#### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

*   Conversion Rate Optimization is the second-most-used optimization technique among marketers (50%). It's second to audience segmentation refinement by just one percent ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2026).

*   Lead-to-customer conversion is the second most important KPI for marketers across businesses of all sizes ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2026).

*   Nearly 56% of marketers say it's much easier to improve conversion rates now than it was ten years ago ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2026).
*   In 2024, the top marketing channels driving ROI for B2B brands were their (1) website, blog, and SEO efforts, (2) paid social media content, and (3) social media shopping tools. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   For B2C brands, the channels with the best ROI were (1) email marketing, (2) paid social media content, and (3) content marketing. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   The average conversion rate across all e-commerce sites is under 2% ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1106713/global-conversion-rate-by-industry-and-device/), 2025).
*   Conversion rates are highest for skincare online shopping at 2.7% and lowest for luxury apparel at just 0.4% ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1106713/global-conversion-rate-by-industry-and-device/), 2025).
*   Email marketing is one of the most effective channels for driving conversions, with a 2.8% conversion rate for B2C brands and a 2.4% conversion rate for B2Bs ([FirstPageSage, 2025](https://firstpagesage.com/reports/conversion-rate-by-channel/)).

#### Mobile Search

*   63% of consumers prefer to find information about brands and products on mobile devices ([HubSpot State of Consumer Trends](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-consumer-trends), 2024).
*   Most marketers report that mobile devices account for over half of their annual traffic ([HubSpot Web Strategy & Analytics Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/website/web-traffic-analytics-report?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-web-strategy-analytics-report), 2023).
*   The average U.S. household had 21 connected devices ([Deloitte](https://www2.deloitte.com/us/en/insights/industry/telecommunications/connectivity-mobile-trends-survey/2023/connectivity-mobile-trends-survey-full-report.html), 2023).
*   Google accounts for over 93.9% of global mobile search market share ([StatCounter](https://gs.statcounter.com/search-engine-market-share/mobile/worldwide), 2025).

#### Organic Search

*   32.9% of internet users aged 16+ discover new brands, products, and services via search engines. ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2024-october-global-statshot), 2025).
*   41% of marketers say the top trend they’re exploring is updating SEO strategy for changes in search

*   70% of B2C marketers say they understand the challenges in organic search and what to do about them. This is higher than the percentage of B2B marketers (62%) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report, 2026](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report-2026)).

#### Voice Search

*   Over 20% of global internet users over 16 years old use voice assistants to find information. ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2024-october-global-statshot), 2025).

*   73.7% of marketers plan on maintaining or increasing their investment in voice search optimization this year. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report, 2026](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report-2026)).

*   Less than 10% of marketers report leveraging voice search optimization (Alexa, Siri, etc.) in their strategy currently. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report, 2026](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report-2026)).
*   Experts forecast voice assistant usage on smartphones will rise to 48.7% of internet users by 2029 ([eMarketer](http://emarketer.com/content/voice-assistants-find-their-next-act-preferred-interface-ai-first-homes), 2026).

*   By the end of 2026, it's predicted that there will be over 157 million voice assistant users in the United States alone. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1384575/voice-assistant-users-united-states/), 2025).

#### E-commerce

*   Smartphones account for over 78% of retail website visits worldwide ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/568684/e-commerce-website-visit-and-orders-by-device/), 2025).
*   E-commerce accounts for over 23% of all global retail sales ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/534123/e-commerce-share-of-retail-sales-worldwide/), 2025).
*   Amazon is the top e-commerce platform in traffic and gross merchandise value globally, with JD.com and Walmart.com rounding out the top three. ([Statista,](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/860716/top-online-stores-global-ecommercedb/) 2024).

#### AEO and AI in Search

*   Nearly 24% are exploring updating their SEO strategy for generative AI in search (e.g. ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report, 2026](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report-2026)).

*   Over 92% of marketers plan on or are already using SEO optimization for traditional and AI-powered search engines ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report, 2026](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report-2026)).
*   Nearly 30% of marketers reported decreased search traffic as consumers turn to AI tools. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report, 2026](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report-2026)).

_Want to access statistics like this and more? [Download our latest report](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#state-of-marketing)._

### Want more data?

Download the latest report from HubSpot Research 

including 70+ data points from 3,400 marketers across the globe 

[Access the Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing)

## Content Marketing Statistics

As a marketer, I’ve found that [content marketing](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/content-marketing?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=content%20marketing&_gl=1*1ief109*_gcl_au*ODQ2ODY1MzkwLjE3MzM0MTMxNTM.*_ga*MTUyMjA0MTA5OC4xNzMzNDEzMTUz*_ga_LXTM6CQ0XK*MTczMzQyNTMyMS4yLjEuMTczMzQyNTk2NC4xNC4wLjA.*_fplc*VjlNT0JYcnJZQ3JYM3ByeWQ5MUp6ekF3NWFtcklLQXZaWWNTR2hUeFZHekVNd1ZaZ3l0NEFLeFNNN2pwbjVSNGt5aGhmcHRwM25CZ0pBdllTMDdOQjBmb0M0ZXh1T3RiQUMyeEZOd2ZEQUh6ZzJyJTJGd0V6ZDg5c3NHeFBhWkElM0QlM0Q.) is one of the most powerful tools in my toolbox. Creating and sharing relevant media with your target audience can help prospective customers learn about your brand, expertise, and products or services.

However, it’s important to consider content marketing statistics to develop your brand’s best content marketing strategy. These statistics offer insight into how other content marketers solve their target audience’s pain points and generate leads. The data here can help you determine which techniques will work best for your business, customers, and leads.

[### Download Now: Content Promotion Templates + Kit](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=b2b7bc6b-cf7e-4a6a-9e7d-b42bef490f0e&signature=AAH58kEnvhn01D5HVybx-kOUUm0J9F3zag&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=4b1a2c88-cd4a-4952-951b-3ae377d2edae&click=6f3797dd-c610-41c4-82fd-2799ecdf90ff&redirect_url=APefjpHUEORdbGfxdZf9eRlXcwA3pJYQMSfghP6a6K_LsFuvEJGq30ziFWMrcL83t679cIDlLsg-0fKd47iWIz1l4Kqr79hDW_HQ2XgXLW-UJ8HElpPs-UUhVK3GCzXaOq18Atc7zzhaNA7LHJt80_daUWghj_Q7CWfpnqth0dPNf12LbH7jSGM&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018464&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Download Now: Content Promotion Templates + Kit")

#### Blogging

*   In 2025, blog posts (38%) were the third most popular content format used by marketers, following short-form video (60%), and long-form video (38%). This is an increase from fourth place in 2024. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   In 2025, blog posts were among the top 5 highest-ROI content formats according to marketers. (22.26%) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   Small businesses are 23% more likely than average to see ROI from blog posts ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   Website/blog/SEO remains the #1 ROI-generating channel according to marketers. It’s followed closely by paid social media with 26%([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   Blog posts were among the top 5 content formats marketers plan to invest most in for 2026, following short-form video, live video, long-form video, and user-generated content ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   About 94% of marketers plan to use AI in their content creation processes (including blog articles) in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   The average blog post length was around 1,350 words in 2025— decreasing for the second year in a row ([Orbit Media](https://www.orbitmedia.com/blog/blogging-statistics/), 2025).

#### Video

*   The top 3 ROI-driving content formats, according to marketers, are all video-based: short-form video (49%), long-form video (29%), and live-streaming video (25%) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   Short-form video is the most leveraged media format by marketers. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   91% of businesses use video as a marketing tool in 2026. 93% view it as an important part of their strategy. ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026)
*   Most marketers(46%)allocate a third of their budget (or less) to video content.([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).
*   YouTube is the most widely used video marketing platform with 82%. ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).
*   67% of video marketers list views as their top KPI, followed by engagement (63%), and leads/clicks (52%) ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).
*   51% of people say that the optimal length for an effective video is 30-60 seconds. 91% said lengths less than two minutes ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).

#### Content Strategy

*   29% of marketers actively use content marketing. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2024).

*   Over 41% of marketers measure the success of their content marketing strategy through sales. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2024).
*   Web traffic is among the top two most-common measurements of success for content marketing strategies. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2024).
*   50% of marketers plan on increasing their investment in content marketing in 2024. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2024).
*   One in two writers use AI tools to boost the performance of their content ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   48% of social media marketers share similar or repurposed content across platforms with minor moderations or adaptations. In comparison, 34% make unique content from scratch for each platform, and 17% share the same content across platforms ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   13% of marketing leaders report that content strategy is their top challenge ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).

#### Audio

*   91% of marketers plan to maintain or increase their investment in podcasts and audio content in 2025. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2025).

*   25% of marketers leverage podcasts or other audio content as part of their content strategy. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report,](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing) 2024).
*   Ad spending in the digital audio advertising market is projected to reach more than $12.16 billion in 2025 and $14.84 billion in 2029 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/outlook/amo/advertising/audio-advertising/digital-audio-advertising/worldwide), 2025).
*   73% of participants in a study agreed that they are open to listening to ads on audio streaming services if the tone fits what they’re doing at the time. ([Spotify](https://ads.spotify.com/en-US/sonic-science/vol-2/), 2025).
*   53% of people who own a smart speaker and have heard an ad on their device say they will likely respond to it ([Basis Technologies, 2023](https://basis.com/blog/the-power-of-sound-audio-advertising-by-the-numbers)).

![Image 27: marketing-statistics-most-popular-marketing-channel](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/marketing-statistics-most-popular-marketing-channel.png?width=687&height=605&name=marketing-statistics-most-popular-marketing-channel.png)

_Want to access statistics like this and more? [Access Our Latest Research](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#state-of-marketing)._

## Social Media Statistics

With [billions of people on social media globally](https://www.statista.com/statistics/278414/number-of-worldwide-social-network-users/), understanding how to market on various platforms has become integral to every business’ success.

The [social media marketing statistics](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/social-media-marketing?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=social-media-marketing-statistics) below will give you insight into how marketers today successfully expand their reach, boost brand awareness, and promote their products and services through these platforms — and empower you to do the same.

[### Download Now: Free State of Marketing Report [Updated for 2026]](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=d9473a8d-a397-4547-ba66-06d13bfac60a&signature=AAH58kFiuvrNqGbXf8Fwcxe0wLy8zAnfmg&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=b0f73a5e-16e4-41fd-9511-8564efc560a7&click=7b62874d-b2d6-4b43-86ff-2db8e8f7b269&redirect_url=APefjpGQ7CmD4CTn4panMruaVkyFpJ0po9_jfi75JTR8hQRMTog5euxAlNv4BRxYYIqbvYU9_ioej8vsAcNPLB_-D7SwdH3ANKHhtVW-7J1gv9ZM8P0F9l4GvghxCszSEmVvg-3SDNBfSx1iHJTkrSOjvmJr56R8mA&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018453&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Download Now: Free State of Marketing Report [Updated for 2026]")

#### Facebook

*   69.6% of marketers leverage Facebook in their marketing strategy. Secondly, only to sister platform Instagram at 70%([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   43% of marketers rank Facebook as one of the highest ROI-driving social media platforms ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   28% of marketers report seeing the highest ROI from social media influencers from Facebook. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).

#### Instagram

*   Instagram is the most popular social media platform used by marketers (70%)([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   According to Marketers, Instagram is the most-cited social media platform for ROI([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   26% of marketers plan to explore selling products directly on social media in 2026, including Instagram shops ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Instagram has 3 billion monthly active users globally ([CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/09/24/instagram-now-has-3-billion-monthly-active-users.html?hubs_content=blog.hubspot.com/marketing/author/ramona-sukhraj&hubs_content-cta=cl-pagination-numbers-button-clickable), 2025).
*   92% of Instagram users globally are under 45 years old. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/325587/instagram-global-age-group/?hubs_content=blog.hubspot.com/marketing/author/ramona-sukhraj&hubs_content-cta=cl-pagination-numbers-button-clickable), 2025)
*   22% of marketers report that niched Instagram influencers deliver the next high ROI after Facebook. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).

#### X (formerly Twitter)

*   According to X Data, X has about 550 million monthly active users worldwide, and 250 million are daily active users. On average users spend 30 minutes a day on the platform. ([X Data](https://x.com/XData/status/1769826435576037702?lang=en), 2024).
*   56% of businesses are still investing in X for marketing ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   X is the 5th most popular social media platform globally [(Statista, 2025](https://www.statista.com/statistics/272014/global-social-networks-ranked-by-number-of-users/)).

#### TikTok

*   A new social media platform compared to the competition, 57% of marketers are already using TikTok in their strategy. 32% say it consistently offers the highest ROI, making it the fourth-highest ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   TikTok is the social media channel most marketers plan on using the most in for 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Short-form video is the top media format marketers plan on investing in for 2026, boding well for TikTok as the industry leader ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

#### LinkedIn

*   LinkedIn has over 1.2 billion members ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/essential-linkedin-stats), 2025) across 200 countries and regions [LinkedIn](https://news.linkedin.com/about-us#Statistics), 2025).
*   In 2025, 42% of marketers reported using LinkedIn as part of their marketing strategy. This is an increase of 11% from 2024 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   33.4% of LinkedIn’s users are between 25 and 34, while 20.5% are between 18 and 24 years old, and 15.9% are 35-54. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/273505/global-linkedin-age-group/), 2025).
*   56.9% of LinkedIn users are male and 43.1% are female. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/933964/distribution-of-users-on-linkedin-worldwide-gender/), 2025).
*   More than half of LinkedIn user households earn over $100,000 a year. ([PewResearch](https://www.pewresearch.org/internet/fact-sheet/social-media/#who-uses-each-social-media-platform), 2025)
*   54% of LinkedIn users have at least a bachelor's degree. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/246180/share-of-us-internet-users-who-use-linkedin-by-education-level/), 2025).

*   Four out of five LinkedIn members drive business decisions. ([LinkedIn](https://business.linkedin.com/marketing-solutions/ad-targeting) Advertising)

*   89% of B2B marketers use LinkedIn for lead generation, and 62% say it produces leads for them effectively ([Sprout Social, 2023](https://sproutsocial.com/insights/linkedin-statistics/)).

#### Pinterest

*   Pinterest has 553 million monthly active users ([Pinterest](https://business.pinterest.com/audience/), 2025).
*   In 2026, 22% of marketers reported using Pinterest for marketing. This is a 6% increase from 2025 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   70% of Pinterest users are women ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/248168/gender-distribution-of-pinterest-users/), 2025).
*   Pinterest has a large luxury audience and it continues to grow, up 31% YoY from 2023 to 2024 and growing 3x faster than the platform's overall user base ([Pinterest](https://business.pinterest.com/en-gb/insights/rise-of-luxury-shoppers-on-pinterest/), 2024).

*   Gen Z makes up nearly half of Pinterest’s luxury audience — that's up 47% YoY.5. ([Pinterest](https://business.pinterest.com/en-gb/insights/rise-of-luxury-shoppers-on-pinterest/), 2024).
*   96% of top searches on Pinterest are unbranded ([Pinterest](https://business.pinterest.com/audience/), 2025).

#### Snapchat

*   Snapchat has 477 million daily active users and 943 million monthly active users worldwide ([Snapchat](https://investor.snap.com/overview/default.aspx), Q3 2025).
*   Over 75% of 13-34-year-olds in 25+ countries use Snapchat ([Snapchat](https://investor.snap.com/overview/default.aspx), Q3 2025).
*   Sponsored Snaps drive up to 22% more conversions and achieve

up to 19% lower costs per action (CPAs) when included in an advertiser's broader Snap campaign mix. ([Snapchat](https://investor.snap.com/overview/default.aspx), Q3 2025).

![Image 28: marketing-statistics-social-platforms](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/marketing-statistics-social-platforms.png?width=687&height=579&name=marketing-statistics-social-platforms.png)

### Social Media Management

*   90% of social media marketers say building an active online community is crucial to a successful social media strategy ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   Social media is the most preferred product discovery platform for consumers aged 18 to 44 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   80% of social media marketers believe consumers will buy products directly in social apps more often than on brands’ websites or third-party websites like Amazon ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   66% of social media marketers report that funny content is the most effective for their brand, followed by relatable content (63%) and trendy content (59%) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   Marketers report that their biggest social media challenge is determining which platforms to invest in ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).

### Visual Content

*   22% of marketers said expanding from text-based to visual/audio content was the most effective diversification strategy for their brand in 2025 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Visual assets (images, videos, colors) are the top things marketers test when optimizing performance([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Nearly 75% of marketers reported using AI for media creation, including video and images. This makes it one of the top five use cases for AI ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Many of the most popular types of AI tools used by marketers are visual content-focused: Smart/AI image editing tools/features (45%), Video or animation generators (44%), SmartAI video or audio editing AI tools (42%), Image or design editors (40%) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

### **Social Media Usage**

*   There are 5.66 billion social media users globally ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/topics/1164/social-networks/#topicOverview), 2025).
*   Social media is 4th most popular type of app download globally. ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2023-april-global-statshot), 2025).
*   Facebook, YouTube, Instagram/WhatsApp, and TikTok are the top 5 most popular social media platforms globally([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).
*   TikTok was the most downloaded social media app in 2025. It was the second most downloaded app overall, following ChatGPT. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1285960/top-downloaded-mobile-apps-worldwide/), 2025).
*   About 64% of the world’s population uses social media ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).
*   The average social media user spends 2 hours and 21 minutes on social media every day([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).
*   About 73% of the global internet users 16+ use social media to research brands and products ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).

*   Globally, Facebook drives the most referral traffic out of all major social media networks, accounting for about 64% ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).

### Looking for more insight on marketing strategies?

HubSpot asked 3,400 marketing professionals about strategy 

Check out our Not Another State of Marketing report for the latest benchmark data.

## Video Marketing Statistics

In today’s marketing landscape, [video marketing](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/video-marketing?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=video-marketing) is critical. While new technology like AI is shaping the efficiency of marketers, [Jonathan Grubin](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/jgrubin_recently-i-was-asked-whats-next-for-marketing-activity-7295737721547816960-F8RE?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABiIobsBB0mBZ3Bti42uxhWYPWW5Vk_wKVw), founder of [Sopost](https://sopost.com/), makes an observation that I agree with. He says, “Many brands have lost sight of what truly connects with people — human emotion.”

There’s no better channel to show human emotion than through videos. Video can be a great way to appeal to your target audience and convert leads into customers. With video capabilities available on smartphones, video marketing is also an affordable and easy tactic to implement, no matter your business type or resources.

Below, I’ve compiled a few statistics to show how companies use this medium to reach, educate, and nurture their customers.

[### → Access Now: Video Marketing Starter Pack [Free Kit]](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=a23b3da2-8d97-43c4-bab2-22cd20dd266a&signature=AAH58kGJibaofpxwnuObVwdUodo8MVy38g&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=8f27c677-d952-4663-8787-bf65c6a1ecf2&click=06c0c0b6-1ccf-4bf6-a387-1b2be05ce5c1&redirect_url=APefjpFd6Yd8WR3NxgeqMODQGYKTzZtRGJNblPee88KfDsVw7XUqCVU8c5CEoDUaxD7kgXF_BSgWGJ8lrh0JnRzT-HBojBwPTnKk1dl6_OiwaXMtGfJdUVX3hbzKf6zykGme5h_Kx-35yFqXJMfQlCiLVsHNXMCK1MMiwPEzWS-tDhqc9AtPWCBeSesRl-1A5xJ355QnN213&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018446&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "→ Access Now: Video Marketing Starter Pack [Free Kit]")

#### Short-Form Video

*   Short-form video (49%), long-form video (29%), and live-streaming video (25%) are the top 3 ROI-driving content formats reported by marketers ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/hubspot-blog-marketing-industry-trends-report?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report), 2026).
*   Short-form video is the most popular content format among marketers. The same marketers reported short-form video delivers the highest ROI([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/hubspot-blog-marketing-industry-trends-report?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report), 2026).
*   93% of marketers say video is an important part of their marketing strategy ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/hubspot-blog-marketing-industry-trends-report?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report), 2026).
*   37% of marketers plan on increasing their investment in video marketing in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/hubspot-blog-marketing-industry-trends-report?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-marketing-report), 2026).
*   73% of consumers prefer to watch a short-form video to learn about a product or service ([The Leap](https://www.theleap.co/blog/short-form-video/), 2023).
*   YouTube Shorts had the highest engagement rate (5.91%) of all short-form video platforms in Q1 2024. TikTok followed closely with an engagement rate of approximately 5.75%, while Facebook Reels recorded an engagement rate of around 2%. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1466388/short-social-video-engagement-rate/), 2024).
*   Despite not being a video-focused platform, LinkedIn reported a 36% increase in video views [(LinkedIn)](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/up-36-over-last-year-video-linkedin-booming-time-now-somasundaram-yqbzc/)

*   The average length of TikTok videos increased to 42.7 seconds in 2024, up from 39 seconds in 2023 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1485205/tiktok-video-duration/), 2024).
*   Most YouTube Shorts are 30-40 seconds long. 50-60 seconds Shorts get the most views. ([INFLOW Network,](https://inflownetwork.com/youtube-shorts-explained/) 2023).

[](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing)

#### Product Video

*   96% of marketers agree that videos have helped increase users’ understanding of their product or service ([HubSpot State of Video Marketing Report](https://offers.hubspot.com/video-marketing-2023?hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=hubspot-state-of-video-marketing-report), 2023).
*   40% of marketers report that the biggest benefit of creating video content is to help their customers understand its products and services ([HubSpot State of Video Marketing Report](https://offers.hubspot.com/video-marketing-2023?hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=hubspot-state-of-video-marketing-report), 2023).
*   96% of people say they watch explainer videos to learn more about a product, and 89% report having been swayed to purchase ([HubSpot State of Video Marketing Report](https://offers.hubspot.com/video-marketing-2023?hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=hubspot-state-of-video-marketing-report), 2023).
*   Around 51% of consumers rely on product videos to make an educated purchase decision ([Plainly](https://www.plainlyvideos.com/blog/video-marketing-statistics), 2025).

#### Video Analytics

*   91% of businesses use video marketing, while 67% of marketers who haven't adopted it yet plan to do so in 2025. ([Wyzowl](https://wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).
*   Most videos uploaded to Wistia in 2023 were under three minutes or between five and 30 minutes long.
*   Videos that run between 30 and 60 minutes are the best at converting viewers ([Wistia](https://wistia.com/learn/marketing/video-marketing-statistics), 2025).

*   As video length increases, engagement rates drop. Videos under one minute see an average engagement rate of 50%, while those over 60 minutes have a 17% engagement rate. ([Wistia](https://wistia.com/learn/marketing/video-marketing-statistics), 2025).
*   82% of video marketers reported that video gives them a good ROI — This number is, however, down 11% from 2025. ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).
*   The most common types of videos companies made are live-action (51%), followed by animated video (23%) and screen-recorded (19%). ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/), 2026).
*   57% of video marketers say video has decreased the number of support queries they receive. ([Wyzowl](https://www.wyzowl.com/sovm-results-2024/), 2026).

#### **YouTube**

*   YouTube has more than 2.5 billion active users ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).
*   YouTube (77%) has the highest mobile audience reach of all leading smartphone apps in the US. ([Statista,](https://www.statista.com/statistics/281605/reach-of-leading-us-smartphone-apps/) 2025).
*   YouTube’s Ad reach is 35.7% female and 42.4% male ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report), 2025).
*   64% of experienced marketers (10+ years) are using YouTube for marketing ([Social Media Examiner](https://www.socialmediaexaminer.com/social-media-marketing-industry-report-2023/), 2025).
*   67% of marketers plan increasing their use of YouTube in 2026 ([Social Media Examiner](https://www.socialmediaexaminer.com/social-media-marketing-industry-report-2023/), 2025).
*   In the United Kingdom, children spend an average of 92 minutes on YouTube Kids daily ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1301729/uk-time-spent-children-video-apps/), 2024).

![Image 29: marketing-statistics-highest-roi-content](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/marketing-statistics-highest-roi-content.png?width=687&height=575&name=marketing-statistics-highest-roi-content.png)

## Email Marketing Statistics

Another essential element of any company’s marketing strategy is[email marketing](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/email-marketing-guide?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=email-marketing). Email marketing remains one of the most effective ways for your business to connect with customers and build lasting relationships. The email marketing statistics below will help you discover how today’s marketers are using email to maximize ROI and connect with customers.

[### Download Now: State of Email Marketing in 2020](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=b2633d8a-850b-48dc-8e2c-c7d886456d0b&signature=AAH58kHEtf_9ST15WvAYSX1YcTFOsHqfHg&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=374920ea-4d2e-4578-bebe-565cb2d9a035&click=4f335618-9ff2-446b-ba8c-cd0b879344e6&redirect_url=APefjpGRuTWHRvhkYDkyX-sTh8FFfXF2Ul_5Td8K7l5Qn9V9JrAD41hzvK6y-u1scyN_6-RqS6qsbgFk0y390HS8BYtUTDjFg8xj98cHyG4uHLULn91BVXomjLtHYq00GrfCivQmRu7KC4QTHHIuHAW7YlnmnVWII5dwDuPnWLfj-5rg_8aRCEyGYLobpU5gbq9iwm_btkbXongQ4YlYfVDImVILK-4HY_p224oNMZjhlKz9EDSv4gtkK_CiFNwO0OGrSfkV8KhOEUcOutF3uGAThdNwJBW24fLBUZe0Kq95cXK0tXCv-Cw&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018457&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Download Now: State of Email Marketing in 2020")

#### Click-through Rate (CTR)

*   The average email CTR across industries is 2.5% ([HubSpot 2025](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/average-email-open-rate-benchmark?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-2025))

*   While email marketing remains a popular marketing channel, only about 8.4% of marketers say email open rates and click-through rates are the most important metrics of success([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

### Email Copy

*   Over 80% of marketers report using AI for content creation, including email copy. ([HubSpot State of Generative AI Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/state-of-generative-ai?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-generative-ai-report), 2026).
*   53% of marketers incorporate basic personalization, such as including a name in email copy ([HubSpot State of Generative AI Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/state-of-generative-ai?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-generative-ai-report), 2026).

### Email Segmentation

*   26% of marketers report email marketing is one of the most effective channels for segmentation/personalization. This puts it in the top 3 of use cases, tying with paid Social Media ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Segmented emails drive 30% more opens and 50% more clickthroughs than unsegmented ones ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   78% of marketers report that subscriber segmentation is the most effective strategy they use for email marketing campaigns ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   53% of small business owners in the U.S., U.K., Canada, and Australia used email marketing as the most frequent strategy for finding new and retaining repeat customers. ([Constant Contact,](https://assets.ctfassets.net/t21gix3kzulv/4hW50gUYSP1vnFBWGesPJf/dcdd24d8e3c8de820eb904d226d65227/Small_Business_Now__The_Current_State_of_SMB_Marketing.pdf) 2024).

### Email Usage

*   The number of global email users reached 4.6 billion in 2025 and is projected to grow to 4.9 billion by 2028([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/255080/number-of-e-mail-users-worldwide/), 2025).
*   About 75% of marketers plan on maintaining or increasing their email marketing investment in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   Over 70% of people across age groups use an email service every month. ([DataReportal,](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report) 2025)
*   With 40% of marketers reporting using it, Email marketing ties with organic social media as the #2 most used marketing channel across all business sizes ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   22% of marketers reported email marketing as one of their top ROI-driving channels. This puts it in the 5th-highest spot. Website/blog/SEO was #1 with 27% ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)

### Mobile Email

*   41% of email views — and 75% of Gmail users’ email views — come from mobile devices ([MailButler](https://www.mailbutler.io/blog/email/email-statistics-trends/), 2023).
*   35% of email marketers use a mobile-first or mobile-responsive design process. ([Litmus](https://www.litmus.com/resources/state-of-email-workflows), 2023).

![Image 30: HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/hubfs/assets/hs-cms-modules/hubspot-logo-white.svg)
Not Another State of Marketing

Check out our comprehensive resource on the current state of marketing.
