## Lead Generation Statistics

[Lead generation](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/beginner-inbound-lead-generation-guide-ht?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=lead-generation) is how your business attracts and converts anyone interested in your brand, products, or services. It's an integral part of every consumer's journey to becoming a customer.

With lead generation statistics, you'll discover how other marketers are using the process to reach their goals related to converting more prospects and leads into paying customers.

[### Download Now: Sales Conversion Rate Calculator [Free Template]](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=309ea91d-4342-4e96-a52e-beda19c99973&signature=AAH58kHfDFS1o_vd1I5e4YHUr3CLi5PORA&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=059a7eef-8ad9-4bee-9c08-4dae23549a29&click=b8e14367-3bb8-4b42-9299-a21172d5587d&redirect_url=APefjpHAJrF5toUE0ga-avLd2DkZ2KY5prCzt2ESybJ7kR2kw9bAQJZztzMfFgtBd0j5eGohbGQgjNRQ2pHcEOUO1Zn3dJxYT-0nnFqbnjavpOBSarCZzzBbQLId7GdFN6OlDMjWXWic44lhkAwbYuXFHy8V1JeIN7sV1nvgdU6QsFh2CV9PQkw&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018462&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Download Now: Sales Conversion Rate Calculator [Free Template]")

#### Demand Generation

*   77% of marketers rated the quality of their leads as high or very high ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   However, 30% of marketers still report generating leads as one of their top challenges in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   37% of marketers say leads are more informed thanks to AI. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   Nearly 70% marketers reported that leads come to them later in the buying process as they've done more AI-assisted research ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   56% of marketers say it's easier to improve lead numbers than it was 10 years ago ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   93% of marketers report that personalization improves leads or purchases ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   40% of marketers reported lead quality and marketing qualified leads as their most important metric in measuring success, the highest of any other metric ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Brand-led marketing is making a comeback, with 37.52% of marketers prioritizing the customer experience with their brand and 28.78% creating content that aligns with their brand’s values. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   Marketers are focusing more on younger audiences. In 2024, 36% target Gen Z (up from 34% in 2023), 72% target Millennials (down from 74%), 41% target Gen X (down from 67%), and 19% target Boomers (down from 27%). ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   74% of marketers say content marketing helped generate demand/leads; 62% say it nurtured subscribers/audience/leads; 52% say it grew loyalty with existing clients/customers; and 49% say it helped generate sales/revenue. 37% say content marketing grew a subscribed audience, and 9% say it reduced customer support costs. ([Content Marketing Institute](https://contentmarketinginstitute.com/articles/b2b-content-marketing-trends-research/), 2025).

#### Marketing Automation

*   47% of marketers report leveraging automation to make marketing processes more efficient ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   93% of marketers report using automation for a dministrative tasks (scheduling, note-taking, documentation)([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   About 92% of marketers use automation for data analysis and reporting ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   80% of marketers currently use AI for content creation, and 75% use it for media production ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   47.18% of marketers say they strongly or somewhat agree that they understand how to incorporate AI into their marketing strategy. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   47.63% of marketers say they strongly or somewhat agree that they know how to measure the impact of AI in their marketing strategy. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).

#### Marketing Analytics

*   The 5 top metrics that matter to marketers in 2026: Lead quality and MQLs (39%), Lead to customer conversion rate (34%), ROI (31%), Customer acquisition cost (30%), lead generation volume (29%) ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Almost 20% of marketers say adopting a data-driven marketing strategy is one of the biggest challenges they face in 2026, while 13% have difficulty sharing data across their organization([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   A majority of marketers feel confident in their ability to use data for personalization ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Only about 14% of marketers feel like they don't have the data they need to effectively reach their target audience ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   A majority of marketers (66% B2B, 69%B2C) say that the data they have about their target audiences is high quality ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   44% of marketers analyze campaign performance weekly ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

![Image 31: marketing-statistics-performace-analysis-frequency](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/marketing-statistics-performace-analysis-frequency.png?width=687&height=572&name=marketing-statistics-performace-analysis-frequency.png)

## Advertising Statistics

Advertising can help you attract customers, improve brand awareness, and generate revenue. The statistics below will help you understand how consumers view paid media today and what advertising tactics work for businesses looking to attract new customers.

#### Adblocking

*   25% of US consumers surveyed say they use ad blockers when browsing the internet. 41% say they are annoyed by advertising in the internet([Statista,](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/997054/attitudes-towards-online-advertising-in-the-us/) 2025)
*   Ad blocking was forecasted to cost publishers $54 billion in lost revenue in 2024. ([Eyeo](https://resources.eyeo.com/ad-filtering-report-pr), 2024).

#### Display Advertising

*   Almost 27% of marketers currently use search/display ads as part of their marketing strategy ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   12% of marketers reported search/display ads as one of their highest ROI-driving channels. It's also one of the channels where they believe segmentation and personalization can be most effective ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Over 75% of marketers plan to increase or maintain their investment in search/display ads in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Digital advertising spending in the US is expected to exceed $383 billion in 2027. ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/242552/digital-advertising-spending-in-the-us/), 2024)
*   Banner ad spending in the US is predicted to pass 74 million in 2026 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/460800/banner-advertising-revenue-digital-market-outlook-usa/), 2025).
*   Nine out of ten dollars spent on display advertising in the United States are allocated using programmatic buying ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/topics/11351/display-advertising-in-the-us/#topicOverview), 2023).

#### Mobile Advertising

*   The U.S. leads the world in mobile ad spending, with an annual spend of over $233 billion ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/267112/development-of-revenue-of-mobile-advertising-worldwide), 2025).
*   China is the second-largest market for mobile advertising, with an annual spend of nearly $163 billion ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/267112/development-of-revenue-of-mobile-advertising-worldwide), 2025).
*   More than 60% of all global web traffic is mobile, making this an essential platform for advertisers ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/277125/share-of-website-traffic-coming-from-mobile-devices/), 2025).

#### Pay-Per-Click (PPC) Advertising

*   With effective optimization, pay-per-click (PPC) advertising can yield average returns of $2 for every $1 spent — a 200% ROI ([Wordstream](https://www.wordstream.com/blog/ws/2022/04/19/digital-marketing-statistics), 2026).

*   A personalized landing page can make PPC ad campaigns 5% more effective ([Ranktracker](https://www.ranktracker.com/blog/the-power-of-ads-and-ppc-statistics/), 2024).
*   84% of brands and marketers said they see good results with their PPC advertising campaigns ([Ranktracker](https://www.ranktracker.com/blog/the-power-of-ads-and-ppc-statistics/), 2024).

*   Over 26% of marketers report segmentation/personalization being most effective in paid social media content ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)

#### Video Advertising

*   In 2025, 48% of marketers reported creating videos for ads ([Wyzowl,](https://wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/) 2026)
*   41% of marketers have spent money on video ads in 2025, up 5% from 2024 ([Wyzowl,](https://wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/) 2026) 
*   Video ad spending is projected to reach over $236 billion in 2026 and more than $268 billion by 2029 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/outlook/dmo/digital-advertising/video-advertising/worldwide), 2025).

*   The video platform TikTok is projected to generate close to $44 billion in advertising revenue in 2026 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1305708/tiktok-ad-revenue/), 2025).

## Marketing Technology Statistics

[](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics)
Marketing technology impacts how you reach your audience, how they consume your content, and how they interact with your brand. As such, it’s critical to stay on top of the latest [marketing technology trends](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/marketing-trends?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=marketing-technology-trends). The statistics below highlight the best ways to connect with your audience and customers through various applications, software, and mobile channels.

[### Get HubSpot's Free CRM Now](https://www.hubspot.com/cs/c/?cta_guid=f3235732-bd64-4be0-b745-7f11d8b43788&signature=AAH58kFEyPeX43Ta8qaeyd_X12QjZQJ_Qg&portal_id=53&pageId=4405495297&placement_guid=cce8490b-7fa9-414a-956e-8a5372564a32&click=5cc2fc06-6ac1-4602-b824-36958529f9fa&redirect_url=APefjpF_JsvFcV90KUyfNEWJCP5rb3rt2KErnBdDRLy6TegiyLFOGqmKxCLJtqtFCzJEi6w7-oKTQ2wcSGeiGnSTL0YscotBx66h55mAeEH8TuzyOZ13V4_mW18iQOyy-LTZ1VTNz9kKwf32CqCL9U83fjAmZBd7aQ&hsutk=afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97&canon=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hubspot.com%2Fmarketing-statistics&ts=1776150018443&hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=cta_button&__hstc=20629287.afa05c2fdefdd02c46c8ee8c6a5f7e97.1776150020342.1776150020342.1776150020342.1&__hssc=20629287.1.1776150020342&__hsfp=a9cc2efcfcc506695dc904ec491f705f&contentType=landing-page "Get HubSpot's Free CRM Now")

#### Messaging Apps

*   14% of marketers are leveraging mobile messaging in their marketing. ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   10.5% of marketers say messaging SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, etc) are one of their biggest ROI drivers ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   Nearly 75% of markters plan to increase or maintain their investment in messaging apps in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   14% of marketers name mobile messaging as one of the best use cases for segmentation/personalization. 11% say they're some of the biggest ROI drivers.([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   There are over 3 billion active users on messaging apps worldwide ([Exploding Topics](https://explodingtopics.com/blog/messaging-apps-stats), 2026).
*   Only 0.5% of the Meta Messenger advertising audience is in North America. Its largest audience is in South East Asia (22.4%), followed by South Asian (18%) ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report?utm_source=chatgpt.com) 2025)
*   94.5% of internet users aged 16 or older use messaging apps each month. ([DataReportal](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-global-overview-report?utm_source=chatgpt.com) 2025)
*   81%of consumers check their text notifications within just five minutes of receiving a text. And nearly 30%check their text notifications within just 60 seconds of receipt ([Simple Texting](https://simpletexting.com/blog/2024-texting-and-sms-marketing-statistics/), 2024).
*   In 2024,79%of consumers opted in to receive texts from businesses ([Simple Texting](https://simpletexting.com/blog/2024-texting-and-sms-marketing-statistics/), 2024).

#### Augmented Reality

*   14% of marketers use virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) as part of their marketing strategy([HubSpot Blog Marketing Trends Report,](https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/hubspot-blog-marketing-industry-trends-report?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-blog-marketing-trends-report) 2024).
*   Over 11% of marketers report marketing in the metaverse (e.g. Horizon Worlds, Roblox ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)

#### Mobile

*   There are nearly 7 billion smartphones worldwide, and 95% of Americans have access to a cell phone ([Exploding Topics](https://explodingtopics.com/blog/smartphone-stats), 2023).
*   More than 60% of global website traffic is mobile ([SimilarWeb](https://www.similarweb.com/platforms/), 2023).
*   74% of people report that they are more likely to return to a website if it’s optimized for mobile ([WebFX](https://www.webfx.com/blog/web-design/user-experience-matters-marketing/), 2023).
*   67% of mobile users say they’re more likely to buy a company’s product or service if its website is mobile-friendly ([WebFX](https://www.webfx.com/blog/web-design/user-experience-matters-marketing/), 2023).
*   More than half of all digital ad spending is focused on mobile ads ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/309712/mobile-share-digital-ad-spend-worldwide), 2023).
*   Social media ads receive the largest portion of global mobile advertising investment, with marketers spending over $140 billion on mobile social media advertising in 2023 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/forecasts/1279518/mobile-ad-spend-worldwide-by-format), 2023).

_Want to access statistics like this and more? [Download the report below](https://www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics#state-of-marketing)._

## Sales Statistics

Advertising can help you attract customers, improve brand awareness, and generate revenue. The statistics below will help you understand how consumers view paid media today and what advertising tactics work for businesses looking to attract new customers.

[_Download our Canadian research report that examines top sales and marketing trends shared by 3,400+ marketers and 500+ global sales leaders._](https://offers.hubspot.com/en-ca/sales-and-marketing-report?hubs_signup-url=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_signup-cta=download-our-canadian-research-report-that-examines-top-sales-and-marketing-trends-shared-by-3400-marketers-and-500-global-sales-leaders)

#### CRM

*   78% of salespeople consider their CRM effective in enhancing sales and marketing alignment ([HubSpot](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot) 2025).
*   52% of marketers who don’t have a CRM felt their marketing strategies were effective in 2024 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   87% of marketers using HubSpot felt their marketing strategies were effective in 2024. ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   61% of sales leaders automated their CRM software in 2023 ([Prezentor](https://www.prezentor.com/reports-and-guides/the-state-of-b2b-sales-2023/), 2023).
*   78% of sales leaders say their CRM effectively improves alignment between sales and marketing teams ([HubSpot Research](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-research), 2023).
*   91% of companies with ten or more employees use a CRM system to manage customer data ([Zippia](https://www.zippia.com/advice/crm-statistics/), 2023).
*   45% of companies report that their use of CRM software has increased sales revenue ([Zippia](https://www.zippia.com/advice/crm-statistics/), 2023)

#### Selling

*   Over 29% of marketers say their primary goal in 2026 is to increase sales/revenue. This is second only to increasing awareness/reach (35%)([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2025).
*   Over 27% of marketers report sales-marketing alignment as a top challenge. Yet only 8% named improving sales and marketing alignment as a top goal in 2026 ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).
*   Nearly 70% of marketers report that leads come to them later in the buying process because they've done more AI-assisted research ([HubSpot State of Marketing Report](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026).

*   Global retail sales are projected to amount to more than $32 trillion by end of 2026 ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/443522/global-retail-sales/), 2023).

*   96% of prospects report doing their own research before speaking with a human sales rep ([HubSpot State of Sales Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-sales-report), 2025).
*   More than half of sales leaders report using sales enablement content, and 79% say these materials are essential for making a sale ([HubSpot State of Sales Report](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics?hubs_content=www.hubspot.com/marketing-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot-state-of-sales-report), 2025).

#### Service Level Agreement (SLA)

*   85% of marketers with a service level agreement (SLA) believe that their marketing strategy is effective ([HubSpot Research](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   Companies with an active SLA are likely to experience greater year-over-year ROI than those without ([HubSpot Research](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).
*   Companies with an active SLA are 31% more likely to hire additional salespeople to meet demand ([HubSpot Research](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2023).

#### Social Selling

*   37% of middle-market and 36% of enterprise marketers reported using social media shopping tools (i.e,Instagram Shop) ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   23% of marketers list social media shopping tools as one of their biggest ROI drivers, while 29% say they're a top use case for personalization and segmentation ([HubSpot State of Marketing](https://www.hubspot.com/state-of-marketing), 2026)
*   35% of sales pros say social media is their top source of high-quality leads. ([HubSpot](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/hubspot-sales-strategy-report?hubs_content=blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot) 2025)
*   45% rate social media “very effective” at driving sales. That’s higher than in-person meetings (44%) or video calls (35%)([HubSpot](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/hubspot-sales-strategy-report?hubs_content=blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot) 2025)
*   Social outreach outranks email for response rates (42% vs. 26%), showing a shift in how buyers engage ([HubSpot](https://blog.hubspot.com/sales/hubspot-sales-strategy-report?hubs_content=blog.hubspot.com/sales/sales-statistics&hubs_content-cta=hubspot) 2025)

![Image 32: Metrics showing the importance of CRM ](https://www.hubspot.com/hs-fs/hubfs/CRMs%20are%20keys%20to%20marketing%20success%20and%20alignment.png?width=687&height=463&name=CRMs%20are%20keys%20to%20marketing%20success%20and%20alignment.png)

## Get Inspired by Marketing Stats

Keeping up with the latest trends and processes in the world of marketing may seem like a daunting task. After all, it’s an industry that never stays still — new marketing technologies and best practices are constantly developing. But by staying on top of the latest marketing statistics, you’ll be empowered to lead your team to success and keep your business ahead of the curve.

## Download Our Latest Research
